evals.expected_output: src/utils/ 하위에 todo-filter 관련 TypeScript 모듈과 colocated 테스트 파일이 생성되고, vitest로 테스트가 통과됨
expectations: A TypeScript implementation file is created under src/utils/
A test file is created following the colocated pattern (*.test.ts in same directory)
The test file imports from vitest (describe, it, expect) matching existing test patterns
Tests cover all 5 Verification items from the spec
The implementation uses a class or chainable pattern as specified in the Approach
A structured Implementation Report is output at the end

evals.prompt: rate limiting 미들웨어를 구현해줘. IP 기반으로 분당 100회 요청 제한하고, 제한 초과시 429 응답 반환해야 해. 테스트도 같이 작성해줘.
evals.expected_output: src/services/ 또는 src/middleware/ 하위에 rate limiter 모듈과 __tests__/ 디렉토리에 jest 테스트 파일이 생성됨
expectations: Implementation file is created under src/services/ or src/middleware/
Test file is created under __tests__/ directory matching the existing pattern
Test file uses jest patterns (describe/it/expect) without vitest imports
Tests verify the 100 requests/minute limit behavior
Tests verify 429 response when limit is exceeded
The skill extracted requirements from the direct request without a spec file

evals.expected_output: src/transformers/ 하위에 csv_parser.py 모듈과 tests/ 디렉토리에 test_csv_parser.py가 생성되고, pytest로 테스트가 통과됨
expectations: A Python implementation file is created under src/transformers/
A test file is created under tests/ directory matching existing pattern (test_*.py)
The test file uses pytest class-based pattern matching existing test_normalizer.py
Tests cover all 5 Verification items from the spec
The implementation reuses the existing normalizer utility for key normalization
A structured Implementation Report is output at the end
